name: WidgeTDC Graph Navigator
content:
"""
title: WidgeTDC Graph Navigator
author: WidgeTDC Platform
version: 1.0.0
description: Search and query the WidgeTDC Neo4j Knowledge Graph
"""
import requests
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone

class Tools:
    def __init__(self):
        self.base_url = "https://orchestrator-production-c27e.up.railway.app"
        self.headers = {"Authorization": "Bearer WidgeTDC_Orch_2026", "Content-Type": "application/json"}

    def search_knowledge_graph(self, query: str) -> str:
        """
        Search the WidgeTDC knowledge graph (475K+ nodes) using natural language.
        Use for ANY question about platform data, consulting knowledge, patterns.
        :param query: Natural language search query
        :return: Knowledge graph search results
        """
        try:
            r = requests.post(f"{self.base_url}/api/tools/search_knowledge", headers=self.headers, json={"query": query, "max_results": 10}, timeout=20)
            data = r.json().get("data", {})
            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
            return f"### Knowledge Graph Results\n\n{data.get('result', 'No results')}\n\n---\n**Source:** search_knowledge | {ts}"
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Error: {e}"

    def run_cypher_query(self, cypher: str) -> str:
        """
        Execute a read-only Cypher query against Neo4j (475K nodes, 3.8M rels).
        :param cypher: Neo4j Cypher query (read-only)
        :return: Query results
        """
        try:
            r = requests.post(f"{self.base_url}/api/tools/query_graph", headers=self.headers, json={"cypher": cypher}, timeout=15)
            data = r.json().get("data", {})
            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
            return f"### Cypher Results\n\n{data.get('result', 'No results')}\n\n---\n**Source:** query_graph | {ts}"
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Error: {e}"

meta.description: Search and query the WidgeTDC Neo4j Knowledge Graph (475K+ nodes, 3.8M+ relationships)
